verdict: This is a non-chemical tool relying purely on temperature and massage mechanics rather than ingredients. Effective for reducing puffiness and improving circulation, though results are temporary and require consistent use.

_research.name: Cold Roller Facial Massager Stick
pros: Zero chemical ingredients—safe for all skin types
Soothes inflammation and reduces under-eye puffiness
_research.con: Provides no active skincare benefit and requires refrigeration between uses for optimal effectiveness.
